'''鈭歞h-r-v-l''' ('''kadharveloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:finch|finch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:finch|finch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-r-v-l
|-
! Lemma
| kadharveloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidharveloko|thidharveloko]] || [[word:jidharveloko|jidharveloko]] || [[word:shidharveloko|shidharveloko]] || [[word:kidharveloko|kidharveloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudharveloko|thuthudharveloko]] || [[word:jujudharveloko|jujudharveloko]] || [[word:shushudharveloko|shushudharveloko]] || [[word:kukudharveloko|kukudharveloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudharveloko|thudharveloko]] || [[word:judharveloko|judharveloko]] || [[word:shudharveloko|shudharveloko]] || [[word:kudharveloko|kudharveloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudharveloko|thudharveloko]] || [[word:judharveloko|judharveloko]] || [[word:shudharveloko|shudharveloko]] || [[word:kudharveloko|kudharveloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedharveloko|thedharveloko]] || [[word:jedharveloko|jedharveloko]] || [[word:shedharveloko|shedharveloko]] || [[word:kedharveloko|kedharveloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodharveloko|thothodharveloko]] || [[word:jojodharveloko|jojodharveloko]] || [[word:shoshodharveloko|shoshodharveloko]] || [[word:kokodharveloko|kokodharveloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodharveloko|thodharveloko]] || [[word:jodharveloko|jodharveloko]] || [[word:shodharveloko|shodharveloko]] || [[word:kodharveloko|kodharveloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodharveloko|thodharveloko]] || [[word:jodharveloko|jodharveloko]] || [[word:shodharveloko|shodharveloko]] || [[word:kodharveloko|kodharveloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dharveloko|th忙dharveloko]] || [[word:j忙dharveloko|j忙dharveloko]] || [[word:sh忙dharveloko|sh忙dharveloko]] || [[word:k忙dharveloko|k忙dharveloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadharveloko|thathadharveloko]] || [[word:jajadharveloko|jajadharveloko]] || [[word:shashadharveloko|shashadharveloko]] || [[word:kakadharveloko|kakadharveloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadharveloko|thadharveloko]] || [[word:jadharveloko|jadharveloko]] || [[word:shadharveloko|shadharveloko]] || [[word:kadharveloko|kadharveloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadharveloko|thadharveloko]] || [[word:jadharveloko|jadharveloko]] || [[word:shadharveloko|shadharveloko]] || [[word:kadharveloko|kadharveloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadharvelithi|shadharvelithi]] || [[word:shadharveliji|shadharveliji]] || [[word:shadharvelishi|shadharvelishi]] || [[word:shadharveliki|shadharveliki]]
